inputs.name: collapsed
inputs.description: Defines if the group is collapsed or expanded.

inputs.name: growing
inputs.description:
Defines whether the component will have growing capability by pressing a `More` button.
When button is pressed `load-more` event will be fired.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Defines if a busy indicator would be displayed over the item.

inputs.name: loadingDelay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the busy indicator will show up for this component.

inputs.name: read
inputs.description:
Defines if the `notification` is new or has been already read.

*Note:** if set to `false` the `titleText` has bold font,
if set to true - it has a normal font.

outputs.name: ui5LoadMore
outputs.description: Fired when additional items are requested.

outputs.name: ui5Toggle
outputs.description: Fired when the `ui5-li-notification-group` is expanded/collapsed by user interaction.
